hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && case "$FILE" in *.py) cd /Users/michaeljones/Projects/nbhd-united && ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */frontend/*.ts|*/frontend/*.tsx) cd /Users/michaeljones/Projects/nbhd-united/frontend && npx --no-install eslint --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
